vibe: Immersive devotional journey, luxury spiritual tourism, cinematic, mystical, golden glow on dark backgrounds

primary.description: Divine Saffron / Gold for CTAs and highlights

background.description: Ink-black and deep maroon for cinematic depth

devanagari.usage: Used for daily mantras and spiritual chants

components_strategy.hero: Cinematic full-screen with max bg-black/40 overlay. Use framer-motion for smooth entrance. Floating golden bokeh particles over the background. Large bold serif typography.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary: Saffron background with white text, hover glow effect. Secondary: Glassmorphic with golden border and saffron text.
components_strategy.cards: Dark maroon/black base with subtle 1px gold-tinted borders. Soft inner glow on hover.
components_strategy.navigation: Crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) sticky header, 1px bottom border of white/10. Include primary CTA.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle scale up (scale-105), border color shifts to solid gold, shadow intensity increases.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is mandatory. Fade-up and blur-in animations for sections using framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.particles: Use framer-motion or simple CSS animations for floating golden dots (bokeh/dust) in hero and live darshan sections.

layout_patterns.spacing: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for sections. Gap-8 to gap-12 for grids.
layout_patterns.grid: Bento grids for gallery and features. Asymmetrical layouts for storytelling sections (e.g. Miracle stories).

Home: Cinematic Hero: Image background with golden bokeh, large title 'Shree Maa Baglamukhi Siddha Peeth', 'Book Puja' and 'Live Darshan' CTAs
Daily Mantra: Floating devanagari text with audio play icon, mystical background
Temple History/About: Asymmetrical layout with parallax images, overlapping text and imagery
Online Puja Booking: Bento grid of available pujas (e.g., Shatru Nashak, Graha Shanti) with priest profiles
Live Darshan: Video embed wrapper (mock YouTube) with live devotee counter, virtual diya offering interaction
Festivals & Events: Timeline layout with countdown timers for Navratri, Baglamukhi Jayanti
Miracles/Devotees: Masonry wall of beautifully styled testimonial cards
Donation: Premium cards for Gau Seva, Anna Daan, Temple Development
Footer: Newsletter subscription, quick links, detailed contact info, dark contrast

image_urls.description: Diya flame in dark background for virtual offering
Golden glowing bokeh for overlays (use with mix-blend-screen)
Mountain silhouette during golden hour for 'How to reach' section

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Lenis for smooth scrolling.
Use framer-motion heavily for cinematic entrances, staggered list animations, and scroll-linked effects.

Add font links to index.html: <link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Tenor+Sans&family=Tiro+Devanagari+Hindi&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>
Configure Tailwind with these exact font families.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use the specified deep maroon/ink-black (#0A0505).
Never use placeholder text or images. Rely entirely on the provided assets and themes.
For the 3D/Cinematic feel, use multiple background layers (e.g., base color + image + golden bokeh overlay with mix-blend-screen opacity-50) rather than standard flat images.
Build the UI in React/Tailwind/Framer Motion.
For components like the 'virtual diya', create an interactive button that brightens a flame icon or image when clicked.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, selects, and dialogs (e.g., Booking a Puja modal), but highly customize their appearance (remove default gray borders, use golden borders and dark backgrounds).
